---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    css: styles/contact.css
    title-block: false
---

<div class="contact-hero">
<div class="contact-kicker">Let’s Connect</div>
<h1 class="contact-title">Get in Touch</h1>
<p class="contact-subtitle">
I’m always open to connecting about quality assurance, automation, digital transformation, business strategy, and new professional opportunities.
</p>
</div>

<div class="contact-layout">

<div class="contact-left">

<div class="card contact-main">
<h2>Reach Out</h2>

<p class="contact-intro">
Whether you want to discuss QA, academic work, collaboration opportunities, or professional networking, I’d be glad to connect.
</p>

<div class="contact-list">

<div class="contact-item">
<div class="contact-icon">✉</div>
<div>
<div class="contact-label">Email</div>
<div class="contact-value"><a href="mailto:chathumi.cg@gmail.com">chathumi.cg@gmail.com</a></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="contact-item">
<div class="contact-icon">⌂</div>
<div>
<div class="contact-label">Location</div>
<div class="contact-value">Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="card contact-form-card">
<h2>Send a Message</h2>
<p class="contact-form-note">Click send message to open the contact form popup.</p>

<div class="contact-cta-row">
<button class="contact-ghost contact-send-btn" type="button" id="open-contact-modal">Send Message</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card contact-panel">
<h2>What I’m Open To</h2>

<div class="badges">
<span class="badge">QA Opportunities</span>
<span class="badge">Automation Projects</span>
<span class="badge">Professional Networking</span>
<span class="badge">MBA Collaborations</span>
<span class="badge">Tech Conversations</span>
<span class="badge">Business Strategy</span>
</div>

</div>

<div class="contact-modal" id="contact-modal" aria-hidden="true">
<div class="contact-modal-backdrop" data-close-modal></div>
<div class="contact-modal-dialog card" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="contact-modal-title">
<button class="contact-modal-close" type="button" aria-label="Close form" data-close-modal>×</button>
<h2 id="contact-modal-title">Send a Message</h2>
<p class="contact-form-note">Your message will be delivered to my email inbox.</p>

<form class="contact-form" action="https://formsubmit.co/chathumi.cg@gmail.com" method="POST">
<input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="New message from portfolio contact form">
<input type="hidden" name="_captcha" value="false">
<input type="hidden" name="_template" value="table">
<input type="text" name="_honey" class="contact-hp" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off">

<label for="contact-name">Name</label>
<input id="contact-name" name="name" type="text" required>

<label for="contact-email">Email</label>
<input id="contact-email" name="email" type="email" required>

<label for="contact-message">Message</label>
<textarea id="contact-message" name="message" rows="5" required></textarea>

<div class="contact-cta-row">
<button class="contact-ghost contact-send-btn" type="submit">Send Message</button>
</div>
</form>
</div>
</div>

<script>
(() => {
  const modal = document.getElementById("contact-modal");
  const openBtn = document.getElementById("open-contact-modal");
  if (!modal || !openBtn) return;

  const closeModal = () => {
    modal.classList.remove("is-open");
    modal.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
    document.body.classList.remove("contact-modal-open");
  };

  openBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
    modal.classList.add("is-open");
    modal.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
    document.body.classList.add("contact-modal-open");
    const firstInput = modal.querySelector("input[name='name']");
    if (firstInput) firstInput.focus();
  });

  modal.querySelectorAll("[data-close-modal]").forEach((el) => {
    el.addEventListener("click", closeModal);
  });

  document.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
    if (event.key === "Escape" && modal.classList.contains("is-open")) {
      closeModal();
    }
  });
})();
</script>

</div>

<div class="contact-side">

<div class="card linkedin-embed-card">
<div class="preview-top">
<div class="preview-badge linkedin-badge">in</div>
<div>
<div class="preview-label">LinkedIn</div>
<div class="preview-title">Chathumi Bandara</div>
</div>
</div>

<p class="preview-text">
Explore my LinkedIn profile directly from here.
</p>

<div class="linkedin-embed-wrap">
<div class="sk-ww-linkedin-profile-post" data-embed-id="25661354"></div><script src="https://widgets.sociablekit.com/linkedin-profile-posts/widget.js" defer></script>
</div>

<div class="preview-link-row">
<a class="preview-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/chathumi-bandara/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Open LinkedIn Profile →
</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card profile-preview github-preview">
<div class="preview-top">
<div class="preview-badge github-badge">⌘</div>
<div>
<div class="preview-label">GitHub</div>
<div class="preview-title">ChathuBandara</div>
</div>
</div>

<p class="preview-text">
See my coding work, technical projects, and repositories that reflect my interest in software quality, tools, and continuous improvement.
</p>

<div class="preview-tags">
<span class="badge">Code</span>
<span class="badge">Projects</span>
<span class="badge">Technical Work</span>
</div>

<div class="preview-link-row">
<a class="preview-link" href="https://github.com/ChathuBandara" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
View GitHub Profile →
</a>
</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>
